ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., image classification, object detection, segmentation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of the dataset (e.g., image, text, audio) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used for training */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs used for training */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used for training */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model configuration was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model configuration was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation metric */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean absolute error */,
  "max_fm" REAL /* Maximum F-measure */,
  "mean_fm" REAL /* Mean F-measure */,
  "max_em" REAL /* Maximum E-measure */,
  "mean_em" REAL /* Mean E-measure */,
  "s_measure" REAL /* S-measure */,
  "ap" REAL /* Average precision */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area under the curve */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the evaluation metric (e.g., accuracy, precision, recall) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation metric was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the evaluation metric was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model update */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model update was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model update was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_updates_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model revision */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model revision was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model revision was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_revisions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revision_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision update */,
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revision */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision update was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision update was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the revision update was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revision_updates_revision_id FOREIGN KEY ("revision_id") REFERENCES model_revisions ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of the comment (e.g., suggestion, feedback, question) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of the rating (e.g., overall, accuracy, efficiency) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating was deleted (in case of soft deletes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_ratings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
